hero.badge: An AI that learns from you, an ever-growing library
hero.subtitle: Turn your spare time into micro-victories. An ever-evolving library of micro-actions, powered by an AI that adapts to your habits, energy, and rhythm.

problem.title: Time — your most precious resource
problem.description: Every day, dozens of minutes of available time slip away: commutes, waiting lines, breaks between meetings. These fragmented moments feel too short to be useful.
problem.point1: 2 to 15 minutes lost, several times a day
problem.point2: Too short to be productive, too long to do nothing
problem.point3: Cognitive overload from too many apps

features.title: The InFinea solution
features.subtitle: An infinite library of micro-actions, an AI that learns from you. What should you do now? InFinea knows.

time.title: 2-15 minutes
time.description: Micro-actions for every free moment, drawn from an ever-evolving library

ai.title: AI that knows you
ai.description: Personalized suggestions based on your habits, energy, and time of day

capital.title: Time Capital
capital.description: Each session enriches your profile. The more you act, the smarter the AI becomes

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing

premium.name: Premium
premium.feature3: Proactive suggestions at the right time
